narrative:
Madison (precinct in Fayette County) has 728 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
